query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.claim_number,
  c.vehicle_make,
  c.vehicle_model,
  c.vehicle_year,
  c.vehicle_registration,
  c.incident_type,
  c.reported_cause_label,
  c.incident_location,
  LEFT(c.incident_description, 200) AS incident_desc,
  LEFT(c.normalised_description, 200) AS normalised_desc,
  c.status,
  c.created_at
FROM claims c
WHERE 
  LOWER(c.incident_description) LIKE '%cow%'
  OR LOWER(c.incident_description) LIKE '%animal%'
  OR LOWER(c.incident_description) LIKE '%zig%'
  OR LOWER(c.incident_location) LIKE '%zig%'
  OR LOWER(c.reported_cause_label) LIKE '%animal%'
  OR LOWER(c.reported_cause_label) LIKE '%cow%'
  OR LOWER(c.normalised_description) LIKE '%cow%'
  OR LOWER(c.normalised_description) LIKE '%animal%'
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

  OR LOWER(c.incident_description) LIKE '%zig%'

  OR LOWER(c.reported_cause_label) LIKE '%cow%'
